subject: CS2040S Lab 5 — Extended Deadline
body:
Dear students,

Due to the server issues last Thursday, the deadline for Lab 5 (Graphs & BFS) has been extended to Thursday, 10 April 2026, 11:59 PM SGT. Please submit via CodeCrunch as usual.

Also, a reminder that the midterm exam is on Saturday, 19 April 2026 at 9:00 AM in MPSH 1. The exam covers Weeks 1-7 (up to and including graphs). You may bring one A4 cheat sheet (double-sided).

Best,
Prof. Tan Wei Ming
Department of Computer Science

subject: Rag & Flag Day Volunteer Sign-Up — Limited Slots!
body:
Hi there!

Rag & Flag Day is happening on Saturday, 12 April 2026! We still need 50 more volunteers for the morning shift (8 AM - 1 PM) at Clementi MRT. Sign up by Wednesday, 9 April on the NUS Student Life portal.

CCA points will be awarded. Free lunch provided!

Cheers,
NUS Student Life Committee

subject: MA2001 Group Project — Meeting This Monday
body:
Hey team,

Can we meet on Monday (7 April) at 2 PM in CLB Seminar Room 3 to finalize our MA2001 Linear Algebra group project? The submission deadline is Friday, 11 April 2026, 5:00 PM.

Please bring your part of the write-up. I'll compile everything after the meeting.

Thanks,
Jun Hao

subject: FREE Bloomberg Terminal Workshop — RSVP Now
body:
NUS Finance Society presents:

Bloomberg Terminal Workshop
Date: Wednesday, 9 April 2026, 6:30 PM - 8:30 PM
Venue: BIZ2-0301

Learn how to use Bloomberg Terminal for equity research and fixed income analysis. Open to all NUS students. Limited to 40 pax — RSVP by Monday, 7 April at the link below.

RSVP: https://forms.nus.edu.sg/bloomberg-workshop

See you there!
NUS Finance Society
